title: Water Crews Working to Repair Water Main Break on E Washington St
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Water is repairing a water main break on the 200 block of East Washington Street, causing water service disruptions to nearby businesses and a vehicle traffic closure between South Warren and Montgomery Streets through completion of repairs. Sidewalks remain accessible and traffic detours are in place.
